special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Ecco swims through water with progressive speed increase via button tapping. Speed can be maintained by holding button down. Core locomotion mechanic replacing traditional platformer movement.

special_mechanics.name: Ramming Attack
special_mechanics.description: Ecco can attack enemies by ramming into them at high speeds.

special_mechanics.name: Air Jump & Spin
special_mechanics.description: Ecco can jump out of water and perform a purely aesthetic spin in the air.

special_mechanics.name: Echolocation/Song
special_mechanics.description: Button input causes Ecco to sing for communication and echolocation. Holding generates a map of area. Can be upgraded for range and combat effectiveness.

special_mechanics.name: Air Management System
special_mechanics.description: Ecco must surface for air or find vents periodically. Air meter depletion causes health loss (drowning mechanic). Separate health meter recharged by eating fish, singing to clams, or special glyphs.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data. Game is action-adventure with swimming as primary locomotion rather than traditional platformer physics. No exact numerical physics parameters documented in available sources. Gameplay heavily emphasizes momentum control through button input, environmental interaction via song mechanic, and resource management (air/health).
